title: Red March Tremor
text: Your weapon hand shakes whenever old artillery wakes below the route.
flavor: The tremor stops only after the shot is fired.
trigger: Before your first combat roll each session.
penalty: Take 1 wound unless you gain 1 Heat to lock the tremor down.
relief: A gunner follower or weapon gear use may cancel this wound.
upside: If you take the wound and still win the combat, gain 2 trophies instead of 1.
